name: Irenic Acquisition Corp.
description: Irenic Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search on businesses in the technology, media, and telecommunications (TMT) sectors, leveraging the experience and strategic network of its management team to identify and acquire a high-growth enterprise.
